bootcamp_modules.title: Contract and schema proof
bootcamp_modules.goal: Prove every request, response, event, and error shape before runtime work.

bootcamp_modules.title: Fixture lab
bootcamp_modules.goal: Build deterministic happy-path, edge-case, abuse-case, and rollback fixtures.

bootcamp_modules.title: API obstacle course
bootcamp_modules.goal: Exercise auth, rate limits, idempotency, timeouts, retries, and audit logs.

bootcamp_modules.title: Safety ring

bootcamp_modules.title: Bot builder drill

bootcamp_modules.title: Failure replay
bootcamp_modules.goal: Replay old failures and prove they stay fixed with regression evidence.
